primary_objective: Reduce legacy ritualized dominance sufficiently to improve micro-probe interpretability without procedural drift or lineage break.

broader_i3_adapt_families.tool_balance_guardrail: retain read_file and rg_search legacy coverage across all p0 families

interpretability_preservation.contrastive_stress: preserved via thin anchors in dangerous legacy slices
interpretability_preservation.uncertainty_exposure: preserved via retained i3_adapt + i9/i10 conversion families
interpretability_preservation.no_call_and_wrapper_invariants: preserved by leaving non-targeted and no-call data untouched

anti_drift_guards: No synthetic augmentation in this revision step
No change to canonical evaluation contract
Publish pre/post family and tool distribution audits before any training request

1_most_dangerous_legacy_families: high-share i3_adapt_p0_* families with semantic variation ~0
explicit_answers.3_minimum_viable_retained_legacy_exposur: ~0.64 to 0.69 share of targeted rows for first bounded revision
explicit_answers.4_best_strategy_for_interpretability: deterministic family thinning with explicit floors/caps and full retention of i9/i10 conversion families
explicit_answers.5_best_strategy_for_ritualization_reduct: heavy thinning of read_literal/readstyle/long_rg to contrastive-anchor-only exposure
explicit_answers.7_principal_risk_of_over_revision: losing robustness/uncertainty pressure and weakening lineage comparability

not_recommended_next_action: micro-probe execution on current unweighted mix
next_step_recommendation.alternative_path: weighted sampler implementation if and only if auditable deterministic support is added
